backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining data types (UserProfile, Workout, Transaction, MealLog, DailyMetrics) and CRUD query/update methods for a fitness and finance tracker, with role-based access control via MixinAuthorization and AccessControl mixins.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report listing two implemented features: full PWA support (manifest, service worker, index.html linking) and a fixed live step counter hook/widget for Android Chrome, each mapped to relevant files and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document providing one- to two-sentence summaries of every frontend source file, serving as a reference index for the project's React components, hooks, and pages.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point that defines OKLCH-based CSS custom property color tokens for light and dark themes, including chart, sidebar, and semantic UI colors.
frontend/index.html: HTML shell for the FinFit app that sets PWA meta tags, links the web app manifest and Apple touch icon, and mounts the React app via the root div and main.tsx module script.
frontend/public/manifest.json: Web app manifest for PWA installation, specifying FinFit's name, standalone display mode, portrait orientation, green theme color, and a single 512×512 PNG icon used for both 192 and 512 size entries.
frontend/public/service-worker.js: Service worker that pre-caches the app shell on install, bypasses all ICP/Internet Identity network requests, and applies cache-first for static assets and network-first for navigation and other requests.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that registers the service worker, requests DeviceMotion permission after login, and conditionally renders AuthScreen, ProfileSetupModal, or Dashboard based on authentication and profile state.
frontend/src/components/CurrencySelector: Dropdown component that lets the user pick a preferred currency from a fixed list and persists the selection to the backend user profile via the useSaveCallerUserProfile mutation.
frontend/src/components/DailyMetricsForm: A form component for logging daily fitness metrics (calories, steps, date) that auto-fills steps from a step tracker hook and submits data via a mutation query.
frontend/src/components/FinanceAISuggest: Generates and displays AI-style personalized finance suggestions based on transactions, income, and profession, using the 50/30/20 budgeting rule and profession-specific tips.
A monthly calendar component that displays finance transactions grouped by date, with color-coded category indicators and a detail view for selected days.
frontend/src/components/FinanceProfileFo: A form component for saving a user's monthly income and profession to their finance profile, with validation and a save mutation.
frontend/src/components/FitnessAISuggest: Generates personalized fitness suggestions based on user profile (BMI, goal weight, cut/bulk goal), workout history, daily metrics, and meal calories, including calorie targets and training split recommendations.
A monthly calendar component that visualizes workout and daily metrics data per day, with indicators for activity and an expandable detail view for selected dates.
frontend/src/components/FitnessProfileFo: A form component for updating a user's fitness profile (body weight, height, goal weight, workout split) with validation and toast notifications on save.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: A simple footer component displaying the app copyright year and a branded link to caffeine.ai.
frontend/src/components/GoalSelector.tsx: A toggle button component that lets users switch their fitness goal between 'Cut' and 'Bulk', with optimistic UI updates and toast feedback.
frontend/src/components/MealList.tsx: Displays a list of logged meals for a given date, filtered from all meal logs, along with a daily calorie total.
frontend/src/components/MealLogForm.tsx: A meal logging form with a client-side heuristic calorie estimator that parses food names and portion sizes to auto-estimate calories before submission.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: An onboarding modal dialog that collects a new user's basic info, financial details, and fitness profile on first launch.
frontend/src/components/StepTrackerWidge: A widget that requests device motion permission and displays live step count progress toward a 10,000-step goal, handling unsupported, denied, and no-signal states.
Renders a sorted list of financial transactions with category icons, formatted dates, and color-coded amounts. Shows an empty state when no transactions exist.
frontend/src/components/TransactionLogFo: Form component for logging a new financial transaction with fields for description, amount, category (needs/saving/investment/other), and date. Submits via the useLogTransaction mutation and shows toast notifications.
frontend/src/components/WorkoutLogForm.t: Form component for logging a workout entry with fields for muscle group, exercise, sets, reps, weight, duration, and date. Includes a live calorie burn preview calculated from the exercise inputs.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor using React Query. Invalidates and refetches dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context with login/logout functionality, identity persistence across reloads, and status tracking via a React context and AuthClient. Exports both the provider component and the useInternetIdentity hook.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Centralizes all React Query hooks for fetching and mutating backend data including user profiles, workouts, daily metrics, transactions, meals, and fitness/finance profile updates.
frontend/src/hooks/useStepTracker.ts: Custom React hook that tracks daily step counts using the DeviceMotion API, applying a low-pass filter and peak detection algorithm, with localStorage persistence and optional auto-save callback.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Google Fonts, sets up Tailwind directives, and defines CSS custom properties for the FinFit light/dark theme including fitness, finance, and primary accent color tokens.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that mounts the root component wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/AuthScreen.tsx: Authentication screen displaying a hero section with FinFit branding and feature highlights alongside a login/sign-up panel that uses Internet Identity.
frontend/src/pages/Dashboard.tsx: Main dashboard layout with a sticky header showing the user's principal, a bottom navigation bar to switch between Fitness and Finance sections, and a logout button.
frontend/src/pages/FinanceSection.tsx: Finance tab page showing quick stats (total spend, savings, investments), a finance profile form, currency selector, transaction log form, and tabbed views for transaction list and AI advisor.
frontend/src/pages/FitnessSection.tsx: Main fitness dashboard page that displays today's workout/calorie/step stats, goal selector, step tracker, fitness profile, and tabbed views for AI suggestions, calendar, and meal logging. Handles auto-saving step counts to the backend with a debounced timer.
frontend/src/utils/calorieCalculator.ts: MET-based calorie burn estimator that maps exercise names and muscle groups to MET values via a keyword lookup table, then calculates calories as MET × weight × duration. Exports functions for single-exercise and total workout calorie estimation.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility module for reading URL query parameters from both standard and hash-based routes, persisting them to sessionStorage, and cleaning sensitive params from the URL bar without a page reload.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom design tokens (colors via OKLCH variables, border radii, shadows, fonts) for the FinFit brand, plus accordion keyframe animations and plugins for typography, container queries, and animate.
project_state.json: Project state metadata for a Finance & Fitness AI Tracker (v5) on Internet Computer, tracking two pending fix requests: adding full PWA support (manifest + service worker) and fixing the Chrome Android live step counter.
